description: Binary market on a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire by June 30, 2026. At 15% with $3.6M volume. The term structure — March 0.5%, April 3.9%, June 15% — implies the market sees a ceasefire as unlikely near-term but increasingly possible over months.
question: Will Russia and Ukraine reach a ceasefire by June 30, 2026?

resolution_logic.summary: Resolves Yes if an official ceasefire agreement — a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in military engagement — is reached between Russia and Ukraine by June 30, 2026 11:59 PM ET.

triggers.description: Official ceasefire agreement announced by both Russia and Ukraine, or consensus of credible media reporting
triggers.source: Official announcements from Russia and Ukraine

exclusions: Partial ceasefires (energy infrastructure, Black Sea only)
Frameworks without explicit dated halt in fighting
resolution_logic.ambiguity_notes: Same resolution structure as March 31 market. A peace deal qualifies only if it includes a publicly announced halt effective on a specific date.

cross_platform_link.structural_notes: Kalshi has no Russia-Ukraine ceasefire markets. Coverage gap.

related_markets.notes: Ceasefire by March 31 at 0.5% — near-term variant (6 days to resolution)
Ceasefire by April 30 at 3.9% — one-month earlier deadline
Russia-Ukraine ceasefire before GTA VI at 55% — pop culture benchmark for timeline expectations
